docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DAWANNA YVONNE SANTISTEBAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIO DORADO IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTISTEBAN, DAWANNA YVONNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DORADO, MARIO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, DEFENDANT TO PAY $500 PER MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COPYING FEES (21 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SANTISTEBAN, DAWANNA YVONNE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DORADO, MARIO
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON JAN 07, 2026. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO MARIO DORADO RETURN TO SENDER -NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTISTEBAN, DAWANNA YVONNE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2025 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,143.62 FILED BY SANTISTEBAN, DAWANNA YVONNE AS TO DEFENDANT DORADO, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
